data.title: Make lessons compatible with Claude Code rules system
data.description:
Claude Code already has a rules injection feature. We need to make our lessons system compatible with it by:

* Extracting frontmatter keywords from lessons
* Parsing them for Claude Code's rules system
* Enabling auto-injection of lessons as rules based on keywords

This bridges the existing lessons format with Claude Code's built-in rules feature.

Related task: .skogai/tasks/make-lessons-compatible-with-claude-code-rules-sys.md
